title: 2026-07-04 Naha Shikuwasa Lime Humid Saturday
summary: Naha humid Saturday set using shikuwasa lime across a Kokusai-dori / Heiwa-dori arcade snapshot, Okimu museum mode board, Sakurazaka disco-step night, and Naminoue seawall resort pause.
summaryJa: 那覇のアルバム。色の軸はシークワーサーライム。構成は街歩き、ミュージアム、音楽の場、水辺。

images.alt: Adult 18-19 Japanese-centered woman in a Kokusai-dori / Heiwa-dori covered arcade in Naha, tightening a crossbody strap while responding to someone off frame, wearing an ivory sleeveless cotton camp shirt, black Bermuda city shorts with a wrap-front panel, a shikuwasa-lime scarf belt, opaque ribbed ankle socks, black fisherman sandals, and a woven tote with lime details
images.title: 01 Street Heiwadori lime scarf
images.locationDetail: Kokusai-dori / Heiwa-dori covered arcade in Naha

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman walking through an Okinawa Prefectural Museum and Art Museum-style entrance courtyard in Naha, with pale limestone-white walls, deep overhangs, glass doors, plaza tiles, stone benches, outdoor sculpture, and subtropical trees behind her, checking a fabric swatch folder while wearing an ivory sleeveless square-neck tunic, charcoal cropped balloon trousers, a shikuwasa-lime organza waist sash, white low wedge sandals, black cuff, and lime enamel earrings
images.title: 02 Mode Okimu lime sash
images.locationDetail: Okinawa Prefectural Museum and Art Museum-style entrance courtyard in Naha

images.alt: Early-20s Japanese-centered woman on a Sakurazaka-style sloped Naha night street outside a compact theater or live-house entrance, with exterior stairs, warm wall lamps, unreadable flyer clusters, overhead cables, potted subtropical plants, and background pedestrians around her, stepping sideways into a small dance move while wearing a black asymmetric sleeveless halter top, shikuwasa-lime mesh overshirt, charcoal capri dance pants, micro fishnet ankle socks, black wedge sneakers with lime sole edges, and a compact hip pouch
images.title: 03 Disco Sakurazaka lime mesh
images.locationDetail: Sakurazaka-style sloped Naha night street outside a compact theater or live-house entrance

images.alt: Late-20s Japanese-centered woman sitting sideways on a Naminoue Beach / Naminoue seawall after swimming at sunset, fixing a black slide sandal strap while looking toward the water, wearing a shikuwasa-lime one-piece swimsuit as a bodysuit under an open white gauze shirt, washed charcoal wrap sarong skirt, lime-bead anklet, straw tote, and small silver shell earrings
images.title: 04 Resort Naminoue sandal
